title: Mock Match Histories
description: Hand-picked concurrent (alternating-innings) matches between similarly-rated players. Each row in playerFrameScores is one seat in playerDisplayNames order. winnerDisplayName is computed via the same arbiter MatchService.SelectConcurrentWinner uses (highest TotalScore → most PerfectFrames → earliest CompletedAt).

rotation.description: Currently always 'concurrent' (alternating innings; v0.5.5 unified the workflow).

isEfrenVariant.description: When true, every seat in the match plays the Efren variant. Always true for all-pro matches.

playerDisplayNames.description: Players in seating order (seat 0 breaks first). Each name resolves to a player in mock-players.json.

playerFrameScores.description: One int[9] per seat, aligned with playerDisplayNames. Each row's sum is the seat's TotalScore. Highest sum wins (ties → most perfect frames → earliest completion).

winnerDisplayName.description: Must equal one of the entries in playerDisplayNames.
